prompt:

  "outfit": {

      "black over-ear headphones around neck",
      "minimal jewelry",
      "casual shoulder bag"
    ]
  },

  "camera_style": {

  "lighting": {

  },

  "mood": "casual everyday moment, effortless beauty, urban lifestyle",

  "negative_prompt": [
